dow_jones.note: fell back below 50k amid soaring yields

us_markets.note: Soaring Treasury yields hit 16-month highs; 30Y spiked above 5.19%. Tech weighed down by Nvidia/AMD selloff ahead of Nvidia earnings. Home Depot Q1 beat. Micron popped on analyst PT hikes.

treasury.note: 10Y at 16-month high. 30Y above 5.19% — highest in nearly two decades. Bear-steepening continues. Oil kept around $100+ keeping inflation fears alive.

commodities.note: Oil eased slightly but remains elevated near $100. Iran diplomatic progress helping, but risk premium persists.

shanghai_composite.note: Rebounded on US–Iran peace breakthrough, tech stock reversal ahead of Nvidia earnings. Chengxu CEO stated China will permit AI processor imports.

shenzhen_component.note: Tech-led rebound: Cambricon +8.4%, Hygon +2.76%, NAURA +3.63%, Huagong +7.48%

hang_seng.note: Tech services +10.5%. Tencent +2.1%, Meituan +0.7%, AIA +0.8%. SMIC -2.8%, Li Auto -3.5%

asia_markets.asia_sentiment: Asian markets mixed overnight. Japan/Shanghai recovery on Iran deal hopes but chip stocks remain under selling pressure.
asia_markets.lpr_outlook: Markets expect 1Y LPR unchanged at 3.0% and 5Y at 3.5% — announcement later today.
